notableEvents.label: Teoscar Hernández GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Teoscar Hernández grounds into a double play, shortstop Corey Seager to second baseman Josh Smith to first baseman Jake Burger. Will Smith scores. Freddie Freeman to 3rd. Max Muncy out at 2nd. Teoscar Hernández out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Teoscar Hernández rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Teoscar Hernández grounds into a double play, shortstop Corey Seager to second baseman Josh Smith to first baseman Jake Burger. Will Smith scores. Freddie Freeman to 3rd. Max Muncy out at 2nd. Teoscar Hernández out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Freddie Freeman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Freddie Freeman grounds into a double play, first baseman Jake Burger to shortstop Corey Seager. Will Smith out at 2nd. Freddie Freeman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jake Burger reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Max Muncy. Corey Seager to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Josh Smith GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Josh Smith grounds into a double play, second baseman Alex Freeland to shortstop Hyeseong Kim to first baseman Freddie Freeman. Evan Carter out at 2nd. Josh Smith out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Sam Haggerty pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Sam Haggerty grounds out, second baseman Alex Freeland to first baseman Freddie Freeman.

notableEvents.label: Jake Burger reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Jake Burger reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Max Muncy. Corey Seager to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Andrew McCutchen pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrew McCutchen called out on strikes.
